'''Heat Wave''' (formerly known as '''YoLMS''') is a Taiwanese League of Legends team.
== History ==
'''Heat Wave''', initially '''YoLMS''', was founded in November 2015 by former [[Logitech G Snipers]] jungler [[Yo]]. After qualification, they renamed to '''Heat Wave'''.
